svrl:schematron-output.title: Schematron file for transaction Beschikbaarstellen medicatiegegevens MP9 3.0.0 (2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.20.77.4.374 2022-06-30T00:00:00)

svrl:fired-rule.context: //hl7:organizer[hl7:templateId[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.20.77.10.9411']]/hl7:component[cda:substanceAdministration[cda:templateId[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.20.77.10.9430'] and cda:templateId[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.20.77.10.9429']]]/cda:substanceAdministration[cda:templateId[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.20.77.10.9430'] and cda:templateId[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.20.77.10.9429']]/cda:participant[@typeCode = 'CALLBCK'][cda:participantRole]/cda:participantRole/cda:scopingEntity/*[not(@xsi:nil = 'true')][not(self::hl7:id[@root = '2.16.528.1.1007.3.3'] | self::hl7:id[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.1'] | self::hl7:id[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.8'] | self::hl7:id[not(@root = ('2.16.528.1.1007.3.3', '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.1', '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.8'))] | self::cda:code | self::cda:desc)]

svrl:failed-assert.svrl:text: (MP HL7 Medicatiegegevens Organizer)/d159981e32-true-d160340e0: dit element 'addr' is niet gedefinieerd, of niet gedefinieerd met deze inhoud. Mogelijk betreft dit het templateId, code, of id. Verwacht in deze context: hl7:id[@root = '2.16.528.1.1007.3.3'] | hl7:id[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.1'] | hl7:id[@root = '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.8'] | hl7:id[not(@root = ('2.16.528.1.1007.3.3', '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.1', '2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.6.8'))] | cda:code | cda:desc (rule-reference: d159981e32-true-d160340e0)

svrl:active-pattern.name: MP CDA Medication Information Proposal Statement
